description: Tracker test update for KCF tracker

tests.name: test_tracker_not_valid_before_init
tests.description: Verifies tracker is invalid before initialization

tests.name: test_tracker_valid_after_init
tests.description: Verifies tracker becomes valid after init()

tests.name: test_tracker_update_same_frame_stays_valid
tests.description: Verifies update() produces valid solution on same frame

tests.name: test_redetection_same_template_high_score
tests.description: Verifies NCC redetection score > 0.85 on same frame

tests.name: test_redetection_blank_frame_low_score
tests.description: Verifies NCC redetection score < 0.85 on blank frame
